title: Lead Investment Banker at Grant Thornton India

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Grant Thornton India
jsonLd.description:
Grant Thornton India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Srinagar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Grant Thornton India:
Grant Thornton India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grant Thornton India!
